summary: StarScreener is a Next.js 15 / React 19 / TypeScript-strict 'Dexscreener for open source' that ingests real GitHub data for ~300 curated repos, scores momentum (0-100) against rolling baselines, classifies into 10 categories + 5 AI tags, and serves a terminal UI + REST API + SSE stream + CLI + MCP server. Persistence is JSONL files in .data/; Postgres migration is scaffolded (schema.ts + stubbed PostgresXStore classes) but not wired. Root / is redirected to a Railway deploy via vercel.json because Vercel serverless can't hold SSE or the in-memory pipeline state.

stack.ui: Tailwind v4 + lucide-react + framer-motion + recharts + sonner + next-themes
stack.persistence: JSONL files under .data/ (or STARSCREENER_DATA_DIR). No DB wired. PostgresXStore classes exist as NOT_IMPLEMENTED scaffolds.
stack.tests: tsx --test (node built-in), 8 test files under src/lib/pipeline/__tests__/
stack.ci: .github/workflows/ci.yml — typecheck + test + mcp build on push/PR

key_files.role: THE facade. One object `pipeline` that every consumer (UI, API, MCP, CLI, tests) calls. Guards every query with ensureSeeded + hydrateAll.

Shared pipeline entity contracts: IngestResult, RepoSnapshot, RepoScore, RepoCategory, RepoReason, RepoMention, AlertRule, AlertEvent, GitHubAdapter interface, SocialAdapter interface, *Store interfaces.
In-memory InMemoryXStore implementations + shared store-mutation hook (drives the debounced persist).
Cross-route singleton instances of every store + hydrateAll/persistAll/schedulePersist/flushPendingPersist wrappers + debounced persist hook installed on mutation hook.
JSONL read/write for each store under STARSCREENER_DATA_DIR ?? .data/. Best-effort — failures logged, never block.
Real GitHub REST adapter (fetch). Tracks rate-limit via response headers. 2x exponential backoff on 429/5xx. Never throws.
Fixture adapter — kept for tests and the GITHUB_TOKEN-missing dev fallback. Phase 0 stripped the bundled mockRepos dataset; callers must inject fixtures.
HackerNews (Algolia) + Reddit (public JSON) + GitHub-issues adapters. Timeout 5s, no-throw, '[social:<platform>]' log prefix, sentiment inference via keyword lists.
Twitter/X replacement via Nitter mirrors (4 hard-coded). Probes on module load; if none respond, adapter returns [] and UI hides Twitter section.
Orchestrator: createGitHubAdapter() (branches real/mock on GITHUB_TOKEN + STARSCREENER_ALLOW_MOCK), ingestRepo(), ingestBatch(). Normalizes, snapshots, pulls social.
Tier assignment + getRefreshBatch() — picks top-N overdue repos sorted by priority for a given hot/warm/cold tier.
Reconstructs 30-day star history from /repos/{name}/stargazers?Accept=star+json (has starred_at). Capped at ~400 pages = 40k stars (GitHub's hard limit).
Fallback backfill for mega-repos (>40k stars) using /repos/{name}/events WatchEvent stream. Added in commit 77a9cc5.
Composite 0-100 momentum. 10 components × category-specific weights (re-normalized to 1.0) + modifiers (anti-spam dampening, breakout, quiet-killer).
Deterministic rule-based classifier. +30 topic / +15 desc keyword / +10 name keyword / +50 owner prefix. Primary + up to 2 secondaries. Fallback 'devtools'.
CLASSIFICATION_RULES array — 10 category rules (AI/LLM, Dev Tools, Infra, Web3, Frontend, Backend, Data, Security, DevOps, Other).
AI-focus tag rules — 5 flat multi-label tags (claude-code, agent-memory, ...). Intersects with categories; broad matching on topics/keywords/owner.
Assembles human-readable RepoReason (summary + details array) by running detectors against fresh Repo+Score.
Rule evaluator. Builds TriggerContext (current + previous tick) then evaluateAllRules against alertRuleStore; fired events land in alertEventStore.
Pipeline event bus — onPipelineEvent / emitPipelineEvent / subscriberCount. Feeds the /api/stream SSE route.
Zod-validated env at boot. Throws on invalid. Production fail-closed: GITHUB_TOKEN + CRON_SECRET required unless STARSCREENER_ALLOW_MISSING_ENV=true or NEXT_PHASE=phase-production-build.
~300 curated real GitHub fullNames organized by category. ALL_SEED_REPOS consumed by /api/cron/seed.
Zustand client stores — useFilterStore (sort/density/columns/tab/meta/tag), useWatchlistStore (persisted), useCompareStore.
Public app-layer types: Repo, MovementStatus, TerminalTab, ColumnId, SortDirection, FeaturedCard, MetaFilter, MetaCounts.
Tri-state CRON_SECRET helper used by every write/admin endpoint: ok / unauthorized / not_configured (dev convenience).
Postgres-ready TableDescriptor objects. DESIGN-TIME ONLY — not imported at runtime; awaits the Drizzle port.
PostgresXStore scaffolds — every method throws NOT_IMPLEMENTED. Kept so future port compiles against the same interfaces.
DEAD CODE — legacy pre-pipeline scoring file. No importers anywhere in src/. Superseded by src/lib/pipeline/scoring/engine.ts.
SSE bus (/api/stream). Caps subscribers (SSE_MAX_SUBSCRIBERS, default 50), heartbeat (SSE_HEARTBEAT_MS, default 15000ms). Requires long-lived Node — Vercel serverless breaks it.
Tier-driven cron (hot|warm|cold). Returns 401 on bad auth, rate-limit short-circuits with ok:false reason:'rate-limited'.
One-shot ALL_SEED_REPOS ingest in 25-repo chunks × 300ms delay.
'Give me real data NOW' — stargazer + events backfill for every repo in store. offset/limit/skipSeeded/skipRecompute/fullNames/onlyMegaRepos. CRON_SECRET, maxDuration 300.
Main screener table orchestrator. Keyboard nav, column picker, mobile-card fallback. Logs TODO-virt warning at 200+ rows.
Largest component file. Alert rule CRUD UI + trigger preview.
MCP stdio server. Reads from STARSCREENER_API_URL (default http://localhost:3004) — all tools read-only.
Typed REST client wrapper used by mcp/src/server.ts. getTrending/getBreakouts/getRepo/etc.
CLI. Commands: trending, breakouts, new, repo, compare, categories, --help. Zero deps, Node 18+.
NO CRONS. Just a hard redirect of /* to starscreener-production.up.railway.app because Vercel /tmp is ephemeral and kills SSE.
Archive .data/*.jsonl into .data/backup-YYYY-MM-DD/. Refuses NODE_ENV=production.

env_vars.name: GITHUB_TOKEN
env_vars.purpose: GitHub PAT (public_repo scope). When missing, createGitHubAdapter falls back to MockGitHubAdapter (unless STARSCREENER_ALLOW_MOCK=false). Required at prod boot (fail-closed).

env_vars.name: CRON_SECRET
env_vars.purpose: Bearer token for every write/admin endpoint (/api/cron/*, /api/pipeline/{ingest,cleanup,persist,recompute,rebuild,backfill-history}). Shared by Vercel+Railway. Required at prod boot.

env_vars.name: STARSCREENER_PERSIST
env_vars.purpose: 'true'/'false'. Defaults true. When false, hydrateAll/persistAll short-circuit — no .data JSONL I/O.

env_vars.name: STARSCREENER_DATA_DIR
env_vars.purpose: Override the .data root (Vercel: /tmp/.data; Railway: /data with mounted volume). Defaults to path.join(cwd, '.data').

env_vars.name: STARSCREENER_ALLOW_MOCK
env_vars.purpose: Escape hatch. 'true' allows mock-github fallback even with a token configured, used in tests / dev.

env_vars.name: STARSCREENER_ALLOW_MISSING_ENV
env_vars.purpose: Preview-deploy escape hatch. 'true' lets prod boot with missing GITHUB_TOKEN/CRON_SECRET; logs a warning instead of throwing.

env_vars.name: STARSCREENER_API_URL
env_vars.purpose: Base URL for the CLI + MCP client. Default http://localhost:3004.

env_vars.name: STARSCREENER_API_TOKEN
env_vars.purpose: Optional bearer for the MCP client when the target API requires auth. Declared but not consumed by the main app.

env_vars.name: NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL
env_vars.purpose: Public app URL used by seo.ts canonical/og. Default http://localhost:3008.

env_vars.name: NODE_ENV
env_vars.purpose: Gates prod fail-closed in env.ts and refuses reset-data.mjs.

env_vars.name: NEXT_PHASE
env_vars.purpose: Next.js-injected build-phase marker. env.ts skips prod fail-closed when NEXT_PHASE=phase-production-build/phase-export.

env_vars.name: SSE_HEARTBEAT_MS
env_vars.purpose: SSE keepalive comment interval. Default 15000ms, clamped to [1000, 60000].

env_vars.name: SSE_MAX_SUBSCRIBERS
env_vars.purpose: Cap on concurrent SSE clients (503 above). Default 50, clamped to (0, 1000].

env_vars.name: DATABASE_URL
env_vars.purpose: DECLARED in zod schema and referenced in docs/DATABASE.md, but NO runtime code reads it. Stores swap is unimplemented.

env_vars.name: RESEND_API_KEY
env_vars.purpose: DECLARED in zod but UNUSED anywhere. Stub for 'future alerts delivery'.

env_vars.name: NEXTAUTH_SECRET
env_vars.purpose: DECLARED but UNUSED — no auth/next-auth package in deps.

todos.text: Virtualization is not installed yet; we log a TODO when the list ...
console.warn `[Terminal] TODO-virt: rendering ${repos.length} rows without virtualization`
<!-- Live demo: TODO — no public deploy yet. --> (contradicts vercel.json + docs/DEPLOY.md which both reference live Vercel + Railway URLs)
PostgresXStore classes throw NOT_IMPLEMENTED across every method. Intended Drizzle migration is un-done.
TableDescriptor objects are 'design-time documentation' and not wired — the Postgres migration path is a stub.
Phase 0 stripped the bundled mockRepos dataset; MockGitHubAdapter now needs injected fixtures. Fallback path exists but produces empty results without seeding.
Nitter: 'No mock class here. If no Nitter mirror is reachable, the UI hides the Twitter section.' — Twitter data is best-effort with no guarantee.
Public Nitter mirrors are intermittent; TWITTER_AVAILABLE may flip false on boot and stay false for the process lifetime.
Fails loudly on missing GITHUB_TOKEN: 'Rebuild requires a real token — no mock fallback.' — indicates mock fallback is intentionally suppressed in rebuild path.
Comment mentions 'mock-data lookup' stripped — residual pointer to removed mock-data module.
'stripped mock data; this component now hits: ...' — vestigial comment.
'Data source is the live /api/search route; mock fallbacks removed in ...' — vestigial.
Comment: 'Hydrate persisted pipeline state from disk (or fall back to mock seed)' — but pipeline.ts:112 states there is explicitly NO mock fallback. Comment drift.
Same 'fall back to mock seed' comment contradicting pipeline.ts.
Same 'fall back to mock seed' comment.
Same 'fall back to mock seed' comment.
'canonical mapping lives in mock data' — dangling reference to removed mock-data module.

dead_code.reason: Legacy scoring file. No importers under src/. Superseded by src/lib/pipeline/scoring/engine.ts (384 LOC, the real engine).
BYTE-IDENTICAL duplicate of bin/ss.mjs. Maintained as a separate publishable npm package (cli/package.json) but introduces drift risk.
Standalone package scaffolding that shadows bin/ — two sources of truth for the same CLI.
Every method throws NOT_IMPLEMENTED. Compiles but runtime-unusable. Intentional scaffold per docs/DATABASE.md but lives in src/ not docs/ examples.
TableDescriptor objects with no runtime importer — design-time only. Imported by nobody; linter won't tree-shake.
Empty directories tracked for no reason.
Top-level directory literally named 'undefined' — stray from a tool that received an undefined path. Should be deleted.
Declared in src/lib/env.ts zod schema but no code reads them. Premature config for unbuilt features.

secrets_risk.note: Grep for 'ghp_', 'sk-', 'Bearer ', etc. hits only docs (token placeholders) and test-state paths. .env / .env.local / credentials.json not present in repo. .data/*.jsonl carry public GitHub metadata only (stars, topics, descriptions).

src/lib/env.ts throws on invalid env + fail-closes prod boot when GITHUB_TOKEN or CRON_SECRET is missing, unless STARSCREENER_ALLOW_MISSING_ENV=true. The build-phase skip (NEXT_PHASE=phase-production-build) is a known hole intentionally left for Vercel builds.

src/lib/api/auth.ts returns 'ok' when CRON_SECRET is unset AND NODE_ENV !== 'production'. This means a dev deploy mis-tagged as NODE_ENV=development exposes every cron/admin endpoint. Mitigated by prod fail-closed in env.ts, but STARSCREENER_ALLOW_MISSING_ENV=true sidesteps that.
docs/DEPLOY.md includes a Railway project UUID (344c730a-90a9-4591-bea2-de0d2e374566) and the Vercel scope slug (kermits-projects-6330acd4). Not secrets but public-ish project identifiers.

crons.note: docs/INGESTION.md documents 3 crons (0 * * * * hot / 0 */6 * * * warm / 0 0 * * * cold) and docs/DEPLOY.md documents a 4th (/api/cron/backfill-top?n=20 @ 30 2 * * *). NONE are configured in the current vercel.json — file is purely a Vercel→Railway redirect. Operator must run crons via GitHub Actions / Railway cron / manual curl.

git.note: 15 commits total. All work collapsed into two days (2026-04-16 initial scaffold, 2026-04-17 entire platform + 14 iterations). Trajectory over the day shows thrash around Vercel-vs-Railway deploy (124f4fc → f11dc7f → f76784b flip back) and late-day pivots to 'real data rebuild' (7e9f5da → 77a9cc5 → b54ca49). Last commit 2026-04-17; repo is 1 day old at audit time (2026-04-18).

docs_summary.gist: High-level ASCII data-flow diagram: GitHub+HN/Reddit → github-adapter → normalizer → snapshotStore+repoStore → recompute() (deltas+scoring+classification+reasons+ranks+alerts) → queries/service → pipeline.ts facade → /api routes → UI. Documents the facade pattern (single `pipeline` object is the only allowed entry point), scoring weights table (10 components with category overrides), modifiers (anti-spam, breakout, quiet-killer), the 3-tier refresh system (hot 60m/50 cap, warm 360m/20 cap, cold 1440m/5 cap), and storage (JSONL today, Postgres-ready tomorrow).

Operator guide. Walks through: GitHub token creation, local .env.local setup, one-shot /api/cron/seed (25-chunk × 300ms delay, ~300 repos, ~900 API calls), rate-limit math (5k/hr budget; worst-case 75 repos × 3 calls = 225 calls/hr = 4.5% of budget), manual cron triggers, vercel.json cron block (docs show 3 tiers but current vercel.json doesn't have them), Vercel plan caveats (Hobby daily-only), and a troubleshooting matrix (401 / rate-limited / mock fallback / stale-data).

Postgres migration playbook. Documents WHY move (serverless stateless, /tmp ephemeral, multi-region), design principles (interface-preserved swap, facade stable, snapshots append-only, keep JSONL in dev). Proposed stack: Postgres 16 + Drizzle ORM + DATABASE_URL. Full SQL schema sketch (repos/snapshots/scores/classifications/reasons/mentions/alert_rules/alert_events with indices). 8-step migration process references src/lib/db/schema.ts and src/lib/db/stores.ts as the pre-built scaffolds. Alt backends: Supabase / Neon / Turso.

Per-endpoint REST reference. Covers GET /api/repos (period/filter/category/sort/limit/offset), GET /api/repos/[owner]/[name] detail bundle, GET /api/search, pipeline endpoints (status/recompute/ingest/featured/meta-counts/sidebar-data/alerts/alerts-rules/persist), cron endpoints (ingest tier-based, seed), categories + compare. Every route JSON; cron/write routes require Bearer CRON_SECRET; error envelope is { error, ... }.

Parallel Vercel + Railway deploy guide. Vercel = primary UI + REST + daily cron (Hobby limits: one daily cron, 60s function timeout); Railway = full platform incl. persistent SSE (long-lived process on /data volume). Env var table (GITHUB_TOKEN, CRON_SECRET, STARSCREENER_PERSIST, STARSCREENER_DATA_DIR, NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL, NODE_ENV). Vercel scope: kermits-projects-6330acd4; Railway project UUID: 344c730a-90a9-4591-bea2-de0d2e374566. Troubleshooting matrix.

prod: zod ^4.3.6 (used in src/lib/env.ts + mcp uses zod ^3.23.8 in its own package)
unused_suspects: framer-motion — imported in ONLY 1 file (HamburgerButton.tsx). Arguably over-kill for a single hamburger toggle; could be replaced by CSS transitions to drop a 100kb+ dep.
notes: mcp/ is a separately-pinned package (its own package-lock.json + node_modules) — uses zod ^3.23.8 (not ^4 like root) and @modelcontextprotocol/sdk ^1.0.4. Two zod major versions in the monorepo.
No test framework dep — npm test uses `tsx --test src/lib/pipeline/__tests__/*.test.ts` (node's built-in test runner invoked via tsx).
No @anthropic-ai/sdk despite the 'Claude-Code built' branding — StarScreener itself makes no LLM calls.

tests.coverage_note: Only the pipeline library has unit tests. No tests for: UI components, API routes (end-to-end), SSE stream, CLI, MCP server, scoring.ts (dead), db/* scaffolds, or social adapters (nitter/HN/reddit/GitHub-issues). No Playwright / Vitest / Jest — pure node:test via tsx.

data_dir_listing.note: Filenames + line counts ONLY — contents not dumped.
data_dir_listing.observation: Store is healthy for the 4 canonical stores (repos/scores/categories/reasons @ 309 rows, matches the ~300 seed claim + 9 tombstones or renames). Snapshots at 304 implies 5 repos have no snapshot yet (ingested but never rebuilt). All 4 real-time stores (alert-events, alert-rules, mentions, mention-aggregates) are EMPTY — social adapters and alert engine have never fired a persistent mutation on this instance.

public_dir.note: file.svg, globe.svg, next.svg, vercel.svg, window.svg are Create-Next-App defaults — none are referenced anywhere in src/. Candidates for deletion.
